name: DoIP_AnnounceVehicle
title: DoIP_AnnounceVehicle
description: The timing parameter A_DoIP_Announce_Wait in the DoIP.INI file as well as the parameter toInitial_ms configured with the function DoIP_ConfigureVehicleAnnouncement are ignored when using this function, i.e. sending the Vehicle Announcement Messages starts without delay.
The number of messages sent and the time between sends can be configured in the DoIP.INI file and via DoIP_ConfigureVehicleAnnouncement.
example.code:
// Start broadcasting Vehicle Announcement Messages
DoIP_AnnounceVehicle();
